index.title: DigiPulse
index.subtitle: Precision in Status
index.description: Next-generation uptime monitoring. Real-time insights for your infrastructure with zero latency and infinite precision.
index.feat1_desc: Real-time performance checks for your mission-critical applications.
index.feat2_desc: Multi-channel notifications across Telegram, Slack, and email.
index.feat3_desc: Predictive analytics and deep historical data for smarter uptime.

sites.title: Sites

sites.delete_question: Are you sure you want to delete this site? This action cannot be undone.

profile.title: User Profile
